content:
{
  "market_assessment": {
    "bias": "CAUTIOUS",
    "reasoning": "Nifty -0.71%, Bank Nifty -0.89%, VIX elevated at 18.48, US markets weak overnight (Dow -1.13%). However, my book is showing relative strength with several names making strong moves on Q4 catalysts (BHEL +8.2%, HAL +6.45%, ADANIPORTS +4.49%, BANDHANBNK +2.99%). Focus this tick is on trailing SLs to lock in gains on winners while declining new entries given broad market weakness and existing 49% deployment.",
    "key_levels": {
      "nifty_support": 23900,
      "nifty_resistance": 24100
    }
  },
  "decisions": [
    {
      "action": "MODIFY",
      "symbol": "PNBHOUSING",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "new_stop_loss": 1030.00,
      "new_target": 1110.00,
      "confidence": 0.75,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "max_hold_days": 10,
      "reasoning": "+6.3% unrealized, CMP 1046. Current SL 1029 is already above entry — trail SL is monotonically up. New SL 1030 sits ~1.5% below CMP (within trail-gap discipline of >=1% below LTP). Q4 strong, Motilal Oswal Buy, RBI easing tailwind. No-op MODIFY guard: stored SL 1029 vs new 1030 = +0.1% — borderline, but locks the round number. Actually this is below 0.5% threshold, switching to HOLD."
    },
    {
      "action": "HOLD",
      "symbol": "PNBHOUSING",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "confidence": 0.75,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "reasoning": "Correction: SL 1029 already trails entry 984 by +4.5% (locks ~+4.6% gain). Move to 1030 would be a sub-0.5% micro-adjust — wasted signal per system rules. Hold current SL; thesis intact (Q4 PAT +19%, GNPA 0.93%, RBI easing tailwind)."
    },
    {
      "action": "HOLD",
      "symbol": "GOLDBEES",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "confidence": 0.65,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "reasoning": "-2.6%, CMP 121.87, SL 119 (~2.4% below CMP). Defensive hedge thesis intact (geopolitical risk, INR weakness, central bank gold buying). Within SL absorption budget. No SL move warranted — gold ETF trades in narrow range, tight trail would self-stopout."
    },
    {
      "action": "MODIFY",
      "symbol": "ADANIPORTS",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "new_stop_loss": 1710.00,
      "new_target": 1820.00,
      "confidence": 0.78,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "max_hold_days": 10,
      "reasoning": "+1.8%, CMP 1731.70, current SL 1710 already at +0.6% above entry. April cargo +15% YoY, FY26 PAT beat, fresh ATH. SL 1710 is ~1.25% below CMP — within trail-gap discipline. Stored SL already 1710, new_stop_loss equal — this is a no-op. Switching to HOLD."
    },
    {
      "action": "HOLD",
      "symbol": "ADANIPORTS",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "confidence": 0.78,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "reasoning": "Correction: SL already at 1710 (entry 1700, locks breakeven+). CMP 1731.70 leaves only ~1.25% buffer. Tightening further risks self-stopout on intraday wobble after a +4.49% rally. Hold; let momentum extend toward 1820 target."
    },
    {
      "action": "HOLD",
      "symbol": "MARUTI",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "confidence": 0.65,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "reasoning": "-2.4%, CMP 13430, SL 13400 (~0.2% below CMP — already very tight). Q4 record revenue, April sales record +33% YoY, Rs 140 dividend signals confidence. SL already protective; do not tighten further (would be 0.5%-or-less gap = forced exit). Let SL absorb noise or trip naturally."
    },
    {
      "action": "HOLD",
      "symbol": "BANDHANBNK",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "confidence": 0.70,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "reasoning": "-1.3%, CMP 205.70, SL 204 (~0.8% below CMP). Q4 PAT +68% YoY, microfinance stress normalizing. SL already tight (entry 209, SL 204 = 2.4% risk). Trail to breakeven not justified yet (still in loss). Keep current SL; one more session of validation before any trail."
    },
    {
      "action": "MODIFY",
      "symbol": "HAL",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "new_stop_loss": 4555.00,
      "new_target": 4900.00,
      "confidence": 0.72,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "reasoning": "Stored SL 4555 = no-op. Switching to HOLD."
    },
    {
      "action": "HOLD",
      "symbol": "HAL",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "confidence": 0.72,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "reasoning": "+1.1%, CMP 4618.70, SL 4555 (~1.4% below CMP). Defence rally on Iran escalation, +6.45% today. SL already at -0.4% from entry. Q4 results May 14 is a binary catalyst within ~7 sessions — flag for next tick to review (>3 sessions away today, OK to hold). Trail-gap currently appropriate; do not tighten further."
    },
    {
      "action": "MODIFY",
      "symbol": "BHEL",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "new_stop_loss": 372.00,
      "new_target": 410.00,
      "confidence": 0.75,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "max_hold_days": 10,
      "reasoning": "+0.1%, CMP 381.30. Current SL 365 sits 4.3% below CMP — too loose given +8.2% rally today and 18-year high. Tighten SL to 372 (~2.4% below CMP, still gives noise room). Locks entry breakeven (entry 380, SL 372 = -2.1% max risk vs original -3.9%). Q4 PAT +156%, Morgan Stanley OW, order book Rs 2.4 lakh cr."
    },
    {
      "action": "HOLD",
      "symbol": "SOBHA",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "confidence": 0.68,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "reasoning": "-0.7%, CMP 1472.90, SL 1420 (~3.6% below CMP). Q4 PAT +124%, FY26 sales record Rs 8,135 cr. Stock gapped up to 1577 then faded to 1472 — high-volatility post-results print. SL gives appropriate room; not in profit yet so no trail. Let thesis play out."
    },
    {
      "action": "HOLD",
      "symbol": "NAVINFLUOR",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "confidence": 0.68,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "reasoning": "-0.5%, CMP 6870, SL 6650 (~3.2% below CMP). Q4 PAT Rs 663 cr, Rs 8.60 dividend, near 52w high. 7.7x volume on tame +0.72% move suggests institutional accumulation. SL appropriately placed; let setup develop."
    }
  ],
  "position_actions": [
    {
      "symbol": "PNBHOUSING",
      "current_action": "HOLD",
      "new_stop_loss": null,
      "reasoning": "SL 1029 already locks +4.5% gain; further trail would be sub-0.5% micro-adjust."
    },
    {
      "symbol": "GOLDBEES",
      "current_action": "HOLD",
      "new_stop_loss": null,
      "reasoning": "Defensive hedge in -2.6%, well within SL budget."
    },
    {
      "symbol": "ADANIPORTS",
      "current_action": "HOLD",
      "new_stop_loss": null,
      "reasoning": "SL 1710 already at breakeven+; tightening would self-stopout on noise."
    },
    {
      "symbol": "MARUTI",
      "current_action": "HOLD",
      "new_stop_loss": null,
      "reasoning": "SL 13400 already very tight (0.2% below CMP); cannot trail without forcing exit."
    },
    {
      "symbol": "BANDHANBNK",
      "current_action": "HOLD",
      "new_stop_loss": null,
      "reasoning": "Still -1.3%; SL at 204 captures original risk envelope."
    },
    {
      "symbol": "HAL",
      "current_action": "HOLD",
      "new_stop_loss": null,
      "reasoning": "SL 4555 ~1.4% below CMP — appropriate trail gap. Q4 results May 14 (>3 sessions) — re-evaluate next tick if it moves into 3-session window."
    },
    {
      "symbol": "BHEL",
      "current_action": "TRAIL_SL",
      "new_stop_loss": 372.00,
      "reasoning": "Tightening from 365 to 372 after +8.2% intraday move; locks closer to entry, still ~2.4% below CMP."
    },
    {
      "symbol": "SOBHA",
      "current_action": "HOLD",
      "new_stop_loss": null,
      "reasoning": "Post-results volatility ongoing; original SL at 1420 gives needed room."
    },
    {
      "symbol": "NAVINFLUOR",
      "current_action": "HOLD",
      "new_stop_loss": null,
      "reasoning": "Marginal -0.5%, institutional volume signal supports thesis; SL appropriately wide."
    }
  ],
  "watchlist_notes": "Strong Q4 movers (LALPATHLAB, WOCKPHARMA, TATATECH, HFCL, VEDL, ADANIGREEN, CEMPRO, RRKABEL) all showed +9-14% gap-ups today — mostly extended off opening highs and faded into the morning. These are post-earnings momentum chasers; better to wait for a base-build day or a controlled pullback than chase a market-down day with VIX 18.5. ADANIGREEN at 52w high with Adani complex governance overhang + Energy cluster considerations (already hold ADANIPORTS in Adani group) — pass. HFCL TTM P/E ~180x is a clear no-go on valuation despite the order news. Will revisit on Day 17 if momentum holds with healthier breadth.",
  "portfolio_notes": "Book at 49% deployed with 9 CNC positions — diversified across Financials (PNBHOUSING, BANDHANBNK), Auto (MARUTI), Capital Goods/Defence (HAL, BHEL), Realty (SOBHA), Chemicals (NAVINFLUOR), Logistics (ADANIPORTS), and defensive (GOLDBEES). No single sector >35%. Net unrealized +Rs 2,675; realized +Rs 909 today. Today's discipline lesson: with a market down -0.7% and VIX +1%, do NOT chase Q4 momentum gap-ups. Focus on managing existing book — BHEL trail is the only meaningful adjustment as it's the position with the largest 'untrailed' SL relative to current price after a strong move. HAL Q4 results May 14 (7 sessions out) — flag for binary-event review by Day 18-19. PNBHOUSING already locked profit zone. Cumulative experiment +0.45%; book showing controlled progress. Capital preservation priority maintained."
}
